title: Iran to deliver response Thursday to U.S. war-ending proposal via Pakistan mediators
snippet: Iran is expected to deliver its formal response on Thursday (May 8) to the US one-page, 14-point MoU proposal for ending the war, with Pakistan serving as the key mediating channel. Iran's foreign ministry confirmed the proposal was still under review. A senior Iranian MP characterized the reported terms as 'a wish list rather than a serious negotiating document'.
tag_reason: New information: specific Thursday delivery date for Iran's formal response, and Iranian MP's critical reaction.
